narrative: Frühmorgendlicher Mehrverbrauch im INF-Netz. Im Detail zeigt sich die Abweichung vor allem in der Chirurgischen Klinik.

time_series_columns.value: Measured value. Cumulative sensors contain cumulative kWh counters.
time_series_columns.expected_value: Synthetic no-spike counterfactual in the same shape as value. For cumulative sensors this is also cumulative; compare hourly deltas.
time_series_columns.deviation_pct: Percent deviation between actual and expected period values. For cumulative sensors this is based on hourly deltas.
time_series_columns.scenario_event: Marks the injected demo event window.
